plan.failureSummary: The autonomous agent failed to locate the 'Occupation' combobox using cached selectors that appear to contain unstable, auto-generated IDs (e.g., #\\:rl\\:-form-item). The UI labels also seem to have shifted from 'Your Name'/'Contact Email' in the cache to 'Last Name'/'Email Address' on the live page.
observedIndicators: Dynamic IDs detected in cached selectors (e.g., #\\:rl\\:-form-item)
Discrepancy between cached labels ('Your Name') and actual UI labels ('Last Name')
Historical flakiness and prior self-heal success suggests transient environment or UI updates

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry automation
remediationSteps.details: Execute the test with 'clearPageAiCache: true' to force the autonomous agent to re-scan the page and generate fresh, valid selectors for the updated UI.
If the UI IDs are known to be unstable, consider providing more robust semantic hints or increasing the 'page.ai' reliance on labels rather than IDs in the prompt if possible.

plan.notes: The use of deterministic mode with dynamic/auto-generated IDs is the primary cause of failure. The semantic intent of the 'page.ai' instruction is flexible enough to recover if the cache is cleared and the agent is allowed to re-analyze the page.
